location.address: 158 rue Gray, B-1050 Ixelles, Brussels, Belgium

state.message: Open Wednesdays 13h–17h, appointment preferred — contact us before visiting

projects.name: Allo-IA
projects.description: AI-powered documentation station capturing voice, image, and gesture without interrupting creative flow — designed for neurodivergent learners for whom text-heavy reporting is a genuine barrier. Erasmus+ KA210 partnership with LabFab / IMT Atlantique.

projects.name: Invisible Play
projects.description: Empowering youth with sensory sensitivities and ADHD to map invisible barriers in public space using game-based methods and citizen sensing. Erasmus+ KA210, led by Syntonie with Zingarelho (Portugal).

ext_erasmus_projects.note: EU regulations limit KA210 applications to 5 partner projects maximum.
